cloud.plusDescription: Anori Plus is an additional service for Anori that lets you sync your configuration between multiple browsers and devices in real time.
cloud.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete profile "{{profileName}}"? This action cannot be undone.

connectConfirmation.message: Connecting to profile "{{profileName}}" will overwrite your current local configuration with the one stored in the profile. Do you want to continue?

error.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

iframe-plugin.name: Embed webpage
iframe-plugin.limitations: Embedding doesn't work with all pages. Some sites actively resist being displayed as an embedded page, and unfortunately, Anori can't do much about it. This might result in pages not loading (as is the case with Gmail) or working poorly.

anki-plugin.name: Anki
anki-plugin.error: AnkiConnect can't be reached, please make sure, that Anki is running and AnkiConnect is installed.

iconsPicker.selectFamilyOrSearch: Select specific icon family or try searching to see icon suggestions.

importExport.cloudWarning: You have cloud sync enabled. Importing a backup will disconnect you from your sync profile. You will need to reconnect after import. Continue?
importExport.cloudSyncHint: Want to backup you configuration to cloud or sync it across devices in real time? Try <0>Anori Plus</0> — it does this seamlessly.

aboutHelp.p4: If you'd like to support development of Anori with some coin, you can do so <0>here</0>. Crypto and credit card options are available.

analytics.p3: If you'd like to learn more about which data is collected, click <0>here</0>.

bookmark-plugin.checkStatusHint: Anori will make request to page every 10-15 minutes in background to see if it's up. If server is unreachable or returns HTTP 5xx error it will be considered down. This will require additional permission. Checks won't be made while browser is closed or computer is sleeping.
bookmark-plugin.status: Page is currently {{status}}, last status change was {{lastChange}}. Last checked {{lastCheck}}.
bookmark-plugin.permissionExplanation: Anori needs this permission to work around CORS. The wording presented by your browser might be daunting, but Anori doesn't change or read any data from bookmarked websites.
